name: Veracross Independent School Management API
what_it_does: Veracross REST API for independent and private K-12 school management system. Enables AI agents to manage student and family records, handle admissions pipeline and enrollment workflows, access academic records and grading, retrieve advancement and fundraising data (for school development offices), manage faculty and staff records, handle school community directory data, access billing and tuition management, retrieve athletic and co-curricular data, and integrate school data with LMS and educational platforms.
use_cases: Managing student enrollment and academic records from school administration agents
Handling admissions pipeline and prospect management from enrollment management agents
Accessing advancement and alumni fundraising data from development office agents
Integrating school directory data with LMS and communication platforms from portal agents
not_for: Public K-12 districts without independent/private school community and tuition model
Higher education without K-12 school community and family portal focus
Large urban public schools without independent school fundraising and advancement workflows
best_when: An independent or private K-12 school using Veracross wants AI agents to automate admissions management, student records, advancement fundraising, family communications, and LMS integration.
avoid_when: FERPA+COPPA: Student educational records are protected under FERPA. Student data for children under 13 requires COPPA compliance. Independent school advancement data includes donor wealth information that is sensitive. Family financial aid data is highly confidential.

auth.notes: Veracross uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. School-level credentials with student, family, advancement, and academic scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Acquired by Veracross from Finalsite/Blackbaud ecosystem. Partner integration program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — independent school enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual school licensing; pricing varies by school size
pricing.notes: Boston, Massachusetts. Founded 1996. Dominant school information system for independent and private K-12 schools. Used by 1,000+ independent schools globally. Strong US, UK, and international independent school market. Acquired by Investcorp 2019. Competes with Blackbaud (BBLK) for independent school market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA+COPPA: Student records protected — independent school context adds parent/guardian access complexity
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with school partner program
No webhooks — polling required for enrollment and academic updates
Advancement (fundraising) data combined with family records — donor wealth information extra sensitive
Financial aid data is highly sensitive — automatic tuition reduction information is confidential
International school deployments — GDPR and local data protection laws vary by country
agent_readiness.security_notes: Student and family records with financial aid. FERPA, COPPA, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Children data protections. Donor wealth sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Student and family data with financial aid and donor records. FERPA, COPPA, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region.
